scale.name: scale
scale.description: Used to scale the model up or down.

component.name: component
component.description: A component is a block which can be added as a child to a specific block type like an item, vehicle etc, to provide additional functionalities.

entity.name: entity
entity.description: Defines a tile with special properties.

ragdoll.name: ragdoll
ragdoll.description: Defines the ragdoll properties of a bone.

ROOT-SandboxOptions.name: ROOT-SandboxOptions
ROOT-SandboxOptions.description: The root of a script file. Blocks than need to be in the root of the document should have this as parent.

version.name: VERSION
version.description: The version of the handler of the sandbox options. Keep this equal to 1.

BlendWhiteList.name: BlendWhiteList
BlendWhiteList.description: Seems to define blend properties with other fluids.

module.name: module
module.description: A module holds different types of script definitions.

passenger.name: passenger
passenger.description: Defines a passenger position in a vehicle script.

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.description: Defines poison properties for a fluid script.

maxeffect.name: maxEffect
maxeffect.description: Defines the strength of the poison.

minamount.name: minAmount
minamount.description: The minimum amount required to consume to poison the player.

diluteratio.name: diluteRatio
diluteratio.description: The ratio at which the poison is diluted when mixed with other fluids.

timedAction.name: timedAction
timedAction.description: Defines a callable action sound and/or animation.

physicsHitReaction.name: physicsHitReaction
physicsHitReaction.description: Defines the physics reaction a bullet or bomb imposes to objects.

Categories.name: Categories
Categories.description: Acts as a sort of tag list. Notably used in fluid scripts. Doesn't have parameters and instead just functions as a list.

_DOCUMENT.name: _DOCUMENT
_DOCUMENT.description: Not a script block, but serves as the root of the document. Blocks than need to be in the root of the document should have this as parent.

fixing.name: fixing
fixing.description: Defines how an item can be repaired or fixed.

bodylocation.name: BodyLocation
bodylocation.description: Used to define which location on the human character this clothing item can be worn.

canhaveholes.name: CanHaveHoles
canhaveholes.description: Used to define whenever this item can get holes in it.

closekillmove.name: CloseKillMove
closekillmove.description: Used to whenever this weapon can be used to do a close kill move, like knives to assassinate in the back.

conditionaffectscapacity.name: ConditionAffectsCapacity
conditionaffectscapacity.description: Set whenever condition of the item can impact the capacity value of the container.

conditionlowerchanceonein.name: ConditionLowerChanceOneIn
conditionlowerchanceonein.description: The chance impact to reduce the durability of the item, the value is used to calculate the chance by doing $chance = 1/ConditionLowerChanceOneIn$, which means increasing this parameter value will reduce the chance to damage the item.

customeatsound.name: CustomEatSound
customeatsound.description: Custom sound to play when eating or drinking this item, refers to the ID of a sound script. Set to an empty string to disable any sound from playing.

daysfresh.name: DaysFresh
daysfresh.description: How many days this food item will stay fresh with default sandbox settings.

daystotallyrotten.name: DaysTotallyRotten
daystotallyrotten.description: How many days this food item will take to rot.

evolvedrecipe.name: EvolvedRecipe
evolvedrecipe.description: List of evolved recipes this item can be used in.

havechamber.name: HaveChamber
havechamber.description: Whether the weapon has a chamber that can hold a round in addition to its magazine.

itemtype.name: ItemType
itemtype.description: Defines the class of the item which will impact which parameters the item can take and its properties as well as how it is used by the player. Clothing for instance will handle differently their texture and model in comparison to the other type of items, containers can hold items and weapons can be used by the player to attack and deal damage. You cannot use a custom class of item and only the ones accepted by the game.

type.name: Type
type.description: This parameter was replaced by `ItemType` in Build 42.13.

displayname.name: DisplayName
displayname.description: This parameter was removed in Build 42.13, naming an item should be done with a translation entry. See the [wiki](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/DisplayName) page for more information.

minutestoburn.name: MinutesToBurn
minutestoburn.description: How many in-game minutes it takes to burn the food. This value must be higher than `MinutesToCook`.

minutestocook.name: MinutesToCook
minutestocook.description: How many in-game minutes it takes to cook the food. This value must be smaller than `MinutesToBurn`.

itemList.name: itemList
itemList.description: A list of items that can be used as input.

mode.name: mode
mode.description: Whenever the item gets consumed or not. Default is `destroy`.

flags.name: flags
flags.description: Provides information about how the recipe impacts the items used in the crafting recipe or identified as valid items.

mappers.name: mappers
mappers.description: Used to associated a specific input item to another specific output item.

overlayMapper.name: overlayMapper
overlayMapper.description: If provided, this input entry is used to determine the overlayMapper of the `craftRecipe`.

tags.name: tags
tags.description: Tags are used to determine which items can be used as input.

fluidList.name: fluidList
fluidList.description: A list of fluids that can be used as input.

categories.name: categories
categories.description: A category of fluid used to determine which fluids can be used as input.

flags.name: flags
flags.description: Flags determine how the fluid is impacted during the recipe or identified.

singleValue.name: singleValue
singleValue.description: A single fluid value defining the output fluid.

ROOT-ModInfo.name: ROOT-ModInfo
ROOT-ModInfo.description: The mod.info file, which contains all the information about a mod.

name.name: name
name.description: The displayed name for your mod in the game's mod manager. A translation can be provided in the [Mod.json translation file](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Translation).

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the mod, used in a mod list of the user or servers to activate the mod. Make sure to use something unique which isn't shared between mods. **Note:** This is not the same as the [Workshop ID](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Workshop_ID).

author.name: author
author.description: Name of the author(s) of the mod. Multiple authors are often separated by commas but no convention exists.

description.name: description
description.description: Description of your mod, which shows up in the mod manager. The description supports [ISRichTextPanel](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/ISRichTextPanel) tags. A translation can be provided in the [Mod.json translation file](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Translation).

url.name: url
url.description: Shows a URL link in the mod manager on the page of your mod for users to click on to open in their internet browser. The parameter appears as "Homepage" in the mod manager. For a list of valid links, see [URL](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/URL).

poster.name: poster
poster.description:
Image which will show up in the mod manager as the mod image. Multiple posters can be used to show multiple images, but the first one will be used as the main poster in the mod manager. The rest will be in a list of images of the mod that users can click on to view.

Example:
```
poster=poster.png
poster=showcase.png
poster=flying_chickens.png
poster=credits.png
```

If you have multiple versions of your mod (e.g., 42.12 and 42.13) and don't want to copy your images, you can leave them in the common folder and use the following (but use unique names for these images since it will use the pool of all mods and their images in the common folder):
```
poster=../common/mymodname_poster.png
poster=../common/mymodname_showcase.png
poster=../common/mymodname_flying_chickens.png
poster=../common/mymodname_credits.png
```

icon.name: icon
icon.description: Image which will be used in the mod manager to put next to the name of the mod in the list of available mods. This image will be small and while you can use a full image size, you do not need it. You can set your poster as the icon too to not ship two images if desired.

require.name: require
require.description:
Mods required to run this mod. Multiple mods can be specified separated by commas.

Example:
```
require=theNeededMod,theOtherOne
```

incompatible.name: incompatible
incompatible.description:
Mods that cannot be enabled at the same time as this mod. When enabled, the other mods will be unselectable. This mod will also become unselectable if any of the other mods are enabled.

Example:
```
incompatible=theUnwantedMod,theOtherOne
```

loadmodafter.name: loadModAfter
loadmodafter.description:
Loads the mod only after the set of mods listed.

Example:
```
loadModAfter=someMod,anotherMod
```

loadmodbefore.name: loadModBefore
loadmodbefore.description:
Loads the mod before the set of mods listed.

Example:
```
loadModBefore=someMod,anotherMod
```

category.name: category
category.description: Category is used for filtering mods in the in-game ModManager. Known categories are "map", "vehicle", "features", "modpack". Using other terms will not generate a new filter category.

pack.name: pack
pack.description: Name of pack files that need to be loaded by the game. Notably used for [Texture pack](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Texture_pack) and [Tile pack](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Mapping).

tiledef.name: tiledef
tiledef.description:
Name of the tiledef with its ID that are added by the mod. You can find a community managed list of already used tiledef IDs in [Tiledefs used by mods](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Tiledefs_used_by_mods).

Example:
```
tiledef=Excavation 2112
```

If you upload your mod with a new tiledef ID, you can update the list to reduce the chance of incompatibility with other mods adding tile packs.

versionmin.name: versionMin
versionmin.description: The minimum version of the game the mod can be used on. This number needs to be in the format `build.major` at the very least, and not just `build` or it won't work. Example `42.0`.

versionmax.name: versionMax
versionmax.description: The maximum version of the game the mod can be used on. This number needs to be in the format `build.major` at the very least, and not just `build` or it won't work. Example `42.12`.

template.name: template
template.description: Uses a template script data for this vehicle.

animationsMesh.name: animationsMesh
animationsMesh.description: Defines an animated mesh, usually for characters or animals.

tileset.name: tileset
tileset.description: Used to define properties of tiles of tilesets.

Properties.name: Properties
Properties.description: Define properties for a fluid script.

thirstchange.name: ThirstChange
thirstchange.description: The amount of thirst this fluid changes when consumed. Positive values increase thirst, negative values decrease it.

hungerchange.name: HungerChange
hungerchange.description: The amount of hunger this fluid changes when consumed. Positive values increase hunger, negative values decrease it.

calories.name: Calories
calories.description: The number of calories this fluid provides when consumed.

carbohydrates.name: Carbohydrates
carbohydrates.description: The amount of carbohydrates this fluid provides when consumed.

lipids.name: Lipids
lipids.description: The amount of lipids (fats) this fluid provides when consumed.

proteins.name: Proteins
proteins.description: The amount of proteins this fluid provides when consumed.

painreduction.name: painReduction
painreduction.description: The amount of pain this fluid reduces when consumed.

endurancechange.name: enduranceChange
endurancechange.description: The amount of endurance given back.

foodsicknesschange.name: foodSicknessChange
foodsicknesschange.description: The amount of food sickness provides.

fatiguechange.name: fatigueChange
fatiguechange.description: The amount of fatigue this fluid changes when consumed. Positive values increase fatigue, negative values decrease it.

stresschange.name: StressChange
stresschange.description: The amount of stress this fluid changes when consumed. Positive values increase stress, negative values decrease it.

unhappychange.name: UnhappyChange
unhappychange.description: The amount of unhappiness this fluid changes when consumed. Positive values increase unhappiness, negative values decrease it.

animation.name: animation
animation.description: It is unknown what this block does.

attachment.name: attachment
attachment.description: -| Defines an attachment point on a model or vehicle block. The ID is the attachment name, it can be a custom ID or an existing one often used to define specific attachments. While manually modifying the attachment block is definitely possible, it is recommended to use the [attachment editor](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Attachment_Editor) to create and edit those attachments.

ROOT-Scripts.name: ROOT-Scripts
ROOT-Scripts.description: The root of a script file. Blocks than need to be in the root of the document should have this as parent.

isprofessiontrait.name: IsProfessionTrait
isprofessiontrait.description: Defines whenever the trait is a profession trait or not, meaning it will only be available when selecting a profession.

disabledinmultiplayer.name: DisabledInMultiplayer
disabledinmultiplayer.description: If true, this trait will be disabled in multiplayer games.

cost.name: Cost
cost.description: The cost of the trait when selecting a character. Negative values give points, positive values take points.

charactertrait.name: CharacterTrait
charactertrait.description: The registries trait definition ID to link to. see the wiki page about [registries](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Registries) for more information.

uiname.name: UIName
uiname.description: The translation key for the trait's name. The translation key needs to be in the UI translation file. See the wiki page about [translations](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Translations) for more information.

uidescription.name: UIDescription
uidescription.description: The translation key for the trait's description. The translation key needs to be in the UI translation file. See the wiki page about [translations](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/Translations) for more information.

mutuallyexclusivetraits.name: MutuallyExclusiveTraits
mutuallyexclusivetraits.description: A list of trait IDs that are mutually exclusive with this trait. If one is selected, the others cannot be selected.

xpboosts.name: XPBoosts
xpboosts.description:
A list of experience boosts granted by this trait. Each entry should contain a skill name and the corresponding boost amount.

For example:
```cpp
XPBoosts = Axe=1;Blunt=1,
```

grantedrecipes.name: GrantedRecipes
grantedrecipes.description: A list of [craftRecipe](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/CraftRecipe) IDs that are granted to the character when this trait is selected.

category.name: category
category.description: The category under which the recipe will be listed in the crafting menu.

needtobelearn.name: NeedToBeLearn
needtobelearn.description: Whether the recipe needs to be learned before it can be crafted.

skillrequired.name: SkillRequired
skillrequired.description: The skill required to craft the item.

tags.name: tags
tags.description: Tags to define the special behavior of the recipe.

time.name: time
time.description: The time it takes to craft the item, not using a specific unit of time.

timedaction.name: timedAction
timedaction.description: The timed action script to trigger during crafting. Used to trigger animations and/or sounds.

xpaward.name: xpAward
xpaward.description: The amount of experience points awarded upon crafting the item.

wheel.name: wheel
wheel.description: Defines the wheels of a vehicle. While the ID can technically be anything, only the IDs 'FrontLeft', 'FrontRight', 'RearLeft', and 'RearRight' are recognized by the game and will function properly.

option.name: option
option.description: Defines a custom sandbox option for a mod.

min.name: min
min.description: The minimum value the option can have. Only for integer and double types.

max.name: max
max.description: The maximum value the option can have. Only for integer and double types.

page.name: page
page.description: The sandbox option to add the option to. Can be a custom page.

translation.name: translation
translation.description: The translation key for the option's name.

category.name: category
category.description: The category under which the recipe will be listed in the crafting menu.

needtobelearn.name: NeedToBeLearn
needtobelearn.description: Whether the recipe needs to be learned before it can be crafted.

skillrequired.name: SkillRequired
skillrequired.description: The skill required to craft the item.

tags.name: tags
tags.description: Tags to define the special behavior of the recipe.

time.name: time
time.description: The time it takes to craft the item, not using a specific unit of time.

timedaction.name: timedAction
timedaction.description: The timed action script to trigger during crafting. Used to trigger animations and/or sounds.

xpaward.name: xpAward
xpaward.description: The amount of experience points awarded upon crafting the item.

imports.name: imports
imports.description:
By importing the Base module or any other module, you give your scripts direct access to the elements from these modules, and you can use item IDs directly without the module prefix (for example, you can use Nails instead of Base.Nails).

It is overall suggested to not import modules and instead directly reference the IDs with their module.

CopyFrame.name: CopyFrame
CopyFrame.description: It is unknown what this block does.

CopyFrames.name: CopyFrames
CopyFrames.description: It is unknown what this block does.

tile.name: tile
tile.description: Defines some tile properties from a tileset.
